hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if os.path.basename(f)=='.env' else 0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0 if 'src/tube2txt' in f and f.endswith('.py') else 1)" 2>/dev/null && .venv/bin/pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
